wisdom.knowledgebase.serversideencryptio: The KMS key used for encryption.

wisdom.knowledgebase.serversideencryptio.Description: The KMS key. For information about valid ID values, see [Key identifiers (KeyId)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/concepts.html#key-id) in the *AWS Key Management Service Developer Guide*.
